ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "evaluation_time" REAL /* Time taken for evaluation in CPU seconds */,
  "model_cost" REAL /* Resource cost in RAM-Hours */,
  "classified_instances" INTEGER /* Number of instances classified */,
  "AUC" REAL /* Area under the ROC curve */,
  "sAUC" REAL /* Smoothed AUC */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "kappa" REAL /* Kappa score */,
  "periodical_holdout_AUC" REAL /* Periodical holdout AUC */,
  "pos_neg_ratio" REAL /* Positive/Negative ratio */,
  "g_mean" REAL /* G-Mean */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall */,
  "kappaM" REAL /* KappaM score */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., training, testing, validation) */,
  "evaluation_details" TEXT /* Additional details or notes about the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the model belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the model */,
  "serialized_size" INTEGER /* Size of the serialized model in bytes */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary dataset used for training */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, archived, in development) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the model */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "project_leader" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID of the project leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_leader FOREIGN KEY ("project_leader") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, project manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details or notes about the access event */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., successful, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "dataset_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "dataset_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the dataset */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details or notes about the access event */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., successful, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, archived, in development) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model version */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model version was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details or notes about the access event */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., successful, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_access_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., performance, resource usage) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., percentage, seconds, bytes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "value_details" TEXT /* Additional details or notes about the metric value */,
  "value_status" TEXT /* Status of the metric value (e.g., calculated, estimated, missing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES evaluation_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)
